evals.name: full-sweep
evals.prompt:
Fix all issues:

---

HERO SECTION

Headline: Welcome To The Revolutionary Platform That Delves Into Your Comprehensive Business Needs

Subheadline: Our cutting-edge, innovative, and transformative solution leverages synergy across your ecosystem to facilitate seamless workflows. Many experts believe this is the future of productivity.

CTA Button: "Submit"

Trust Bar: Trusted by many companies worldwide

---

PROBLEM SECTION

Businesses today face a myriad of challenges. Managing projects is hard. Communication breaks down. Teams lose track of tasks. Deadlines slip. Reports are late. Clients get frustrated. Budgets overflow. Morale drops. Turnover rises.

This is not just a problem — it's a crisis that underpins the very fabric of modern enterprise.

However, while these challenges are significant, it's worth noting that some organizations have found ways to cope. On the other hand, many have not. The landscape of project management remains a tapestry of competing approaches.

---

SOLUTION SECTION

Our Robust, Agile, And Dynamic Platform

Feature 1: Real-time dashboard with WebSocket connections and React-based UI components
Feature 2: Scalable microservice architecture built on Kubernetes with auto-scaling pods
Feature 3: Comprehensive API with 200+ endpoints, GraphQL support, and OAuth2 authentication

Moreover, our platform encompasses a holistic approach to project management. Furthermore, it empowers teams to unlock their potential through our groundbreaking paradigm shift in collaboration.

---

SOCIAL PROOF

"Great tool!" — J.S.

"Really helped our team." — A user

"Pivotal for our success. A game changer that supercharged our workflows." — Anonymous

---

FINAL CTA

Ready to transform your business? Click here to get started or sign up for our newsletter and follow us on Twitter and check out our blog and join our community Discord.

Button: "Click Here"

---

Output fixed copy only.

assertions.trap: Copy addresses generic 'businesses' instead of a specific person
assertions.description: Must write to a specific person, not a vague audience

assertions.trap: Problem section lists 9 different problems instead of one
assertions.description: Must state a single problem, not scatter across many

assertions.trap: Final CTA asks for 5 actions: sign up, newsletter, Twitter, blog, Discord
assertions.description: Must end with one clear next step, not multiple competing actions

assertions.trap: Copy follows no recognizable framework (no PAS/AIDA/StoryBrand/BAB structure)
assertions.description: Must use a proven copywriting framework like PAS, AIDA, StoryBrand, or BAB

assertions.trap: Uses banned words: delve, revolutionary, comprehensive, cutting-edge, innovative, transformative, leverage, synergy, ecosystem, facilitate, seamless, myriad, underpins, tapestry, landscape, robust, agile, dynamic, moreover, furthermore, holistic, encompasses, empowers, unlock, groundbreaking, paradigm shift, pivotal, game changer, supercharged, scalable
assertions.description: Must not use any word from the banned vocabulary list

assertions.trap: 'cutting-edge, innovative, and transformative' and 'robust, agile, and dynamic' are AI-tell triple groupings
assertions.description: Must not group adjectives in threes, a telltale AI pattern

assertions.trap: 'This is not just a problem — it's a crisis' uses the 'not just X but Y' construction
assertions.description: Must not use 'not just X, but Y' pattern; state what it IS instead

assertions.trap: 'Many experts believe' names no specific source
assertions.description: Must name specific sources or remove attribution entirely

assertions.trap: 'However, while these challenges are significant... On the other hand' is the classic AI setup-pivot-conclusion
assertions.description: Must not use the setup + 'However' + balanced conclusion pattern

assertions.trap: Problem section balances 'some have found ways to cope' vs 'many have not' symmetrically
assertions.description: Must not present symmetrical balanced arguments; real analysis is asymmetric

assertions.trap: Uses em dashes between words: 'problem — it's a crisis'
assertions.description: Must not use em dashes between words

assertions.trap: Headings use title case: 'Welcome To The Revolutionary Platform', 'Our Robust, Agile, And Dynamic Platform'
assertions.description: Must use sentence case in headings, not title case

assertions.trap: Solution section lists raw technical features (WebSocket, Kubernetes, GraphQL, OAuth2) with zero user benefits
assertions.description: Must describe what features do FOR the user, not what they ARE technically

assertions.trap: Headline is 14 words, exceeds the 10-word maximum
assertions.description: Headline must be value proposition in 10 words or less

assertions.trap: Headline starts with 'Welcome To' instead of an action verb with specific outcome
assertions.description: Headline must follow formula: action verb + specific outcome + timeframe or contrast

assertions.trap: CTA buttons say 'Submit' and 'Click Here' instead of starting with action verbs tied to outcomes
assertions.description: Every CTA must start with an action verb and be specific about the outcome

assertions.trap: No reassurance microcopy near CTAs (no 'Free', 'No credit card', 'Cancel anytime')
assertions.description: Must include anxiety-reducing microcopy directly beside CTAs

assertions.trap: 'Trusted by many companies worldwide' uses vague quantity instead of specific numbers
assertions.description: Must use specific numbers and data, not vague quantities like 'many'

assertions.trap: Testimonials lack full attribution: only initials, 'A user', and 'Anonymous' instead of name + role + company
assertions.description: Testimonials must include quote + name + role + company

assertions.trap: 'Great tool!' and 'Really helped our team' are generic, unspecific testimonials with no detail
assertions.description: Social proof must include specific, detailed, credible quotes

assertions.trap: Final CTA section has no urgency/scarcity element and no risk reversal (guarantee)
assertions.description: Final CTA must include urgency or scarcity element plus risk reversal

assertions.trap: First line is a generic welcome with no clear value takeaway
assertions.description: Must have a clear takeaway in the first line; don't bury the lead

assertions.trap: Problem section uses 9 consecutive short sentences of identical length and structure
assertions.description: Must vary sentence length to sound human
